schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
schemes.benefit: Zero-balance bank account, RuPay debit card, ₹1 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life insurance

key_conditions: Must not already have a savings bank account
Should not be an income tax payer
Should not be a subscriber of Aam Aadmi Bima Yojana
documents_required: Voter ID / any government photo ID
eligibility.income_limit: No income limit; income tax payers excluded

application_steps: Visit nearest bank branch or Business Correspondent
Fill PMJDY account opening form
Submit KYC documents (Aadhaar preferred)
Account opened with zero balance instantly

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
schemes.benefit: Health insurance up to ₹5 lakh/year per family for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation

age.special: All senior citizens aged 70+ eligible regardless of SECC

eligibility.income_limit: No strict limit; families with monthly income > ₹10,000 generally excluded
rural_criteria: Households with only one room with kutcha walls and kutcha roof
Households with no adult member aged 16–59
Female-headed households with no adult male member aged 16–59
Households with a disabled member and no able-bodied adult
Landless households dependent on manual casual labour

application_steps: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or call 14555
Visit nearest Ayushman Mitra at empanelled hospital
Submit Aadhaar and ration card
Get Ayushman Card generated on spot

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
schemes.benefit: ₹6,000 per year in 3 instalments of ₹2,000 each via Direct Benefit Transfer

eligibility.land_ownership: Must own cultivable agricultural land (any size)
eligibility.family_definition: Husband, wife, and minor children who collectively own cultivable land
exclusions: Government employees (except Group D / Class IV / MTS staff)
Professionals: doctors, engineers, lawyers, CAs, architects

application_steps: Visit pmkisan.gov.in and click 'Farmer Corner'
Click 'New Farmer Registration'
Enter Aadhaar number and state
Fill personal and bank details
Complete eKYC via OTP or biometric
Submit and wait for state verification

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs / Rural Development
schemes.benefit: Subsidised housing loan interest / financial assistance for house construction

eligibility.key_condition: Should not own a pucca house in India in any family member's name
exclusions: Previously availed any government housing scheme benefit

application_steps: Visit pmaymis.gov.in or Common Service Centre (CSC)
Select PMAY-Urban or PMAY-Rural based on location
Fill online application with personal and income details
Upload required documents
Submit and note Application ID
Bank disburses subsidy after technical verification

schemes.name: PM Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY) / Ujjwala 2.0
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
schemes.benefit: Free LPG connection with ₹1,600 financial assistance; first refill and hotplate free under Ujjwala 2.0

eligibility.applicant: Adult woman aged 18 years or above
eligibility.key_condition: Household should not already have an LPG connection
documents_required: BPL proof or SECC list inclusion

application_steps: Visit nearest LPG distributor (IOC, BPCL, HPCL)
Fill KYC form and Ujjwala application form
Submit Aadhaar, ration card, and bank details
Distributor verifies and forwards to oil company
Connection delivered to home

schemes.name: Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM)
schemes.benefit: Functional Household Tap Connection (FHTC) providing safe drinking water at home

eligibility.target_beneficiary: Rural households without a household tap connection
eligibility.key_condition: Village must be selected under JJM scheme by state government

application_steps: Contact Gram Panchayat / Pani Samiti of your village
Village Water & Sanitation Committee (VWSC) registers households
State PWD / PHED installs tap connections
No direct online application needed; beneficiary identified by village

schemes.name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
schemes.benefit: Legal guarantee of 100 days of unskilled wage employment per household per year

eligibility.willingness: Must be willing to do unskilled manual labour

application_steps: Visit Gram Panchayat office
Apply for Job Card (Form A) with family details
Job Card issued within 15 days
Apply for work when required; work provided within 15 days
Wages credited directly to bank / post office account

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.benefit: Crop loss insurance; premium as low as 1.5–2% for food crops, 5% for horticulture

eligibility.applicant: All farmers including tenant farmers and sharecroppers
eligibility.crop_type: Only notified crops in notified areas
eligibility.loanee_farmers: Automatically enrolled unless they opt out in writing
eligibility.non_loanee_farmers: Voluntary; must apply before cut-off date

application_steps: Visit nearest bank branch, CSC, or pmfby.gov.in
Fill crop insurance application before cut-off date
Submit Aadhaar, land records, and sowing declaration
Pay applicable premium amount
Receive policy document / acknowledgement

schemes.name: Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Jal Shakti / Housing and Urban Affairs
schemes.benefit: Incentive of ₹12,000 for construction of household toilet (rural); solid waste management support (urban)

eligibility.residence: Rural: households without toilet; Urban: all households / ULBs
eligibility.key_condition: Household must not already have a pucca toilet

application_steps: Visit Gram Panchayat (rural) or ULB office (urban)
Apply through swachhbharaturban.gov.in or local body
Toilet construction verified by local authority
Incentive of ₹12,000 transferred to bank account post-construction

schemes.name: Digital India
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
schemes.benefit: Digital literacy, internet connectivity, e-governance services, Common Service Centres

PMGDISHA.name: PM Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan
PMGDISHA.condition: One digitally illiterate member per rural household

application_steps: Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC)
Enrol for PM Gramin Digital Saksharta Abhiyan (rural)
Complete digital literacy training
Receive digital literacy certificate

schemes.name: Poshan Abhiyaan (National Nutrition Mission)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.benefit: Nutritional support for children under 6, pregnant women, and lactating mothers; reduces stunting and malnutrition

eligibility.residence: All (priority to rural, tribal, and aspirational districts)

application_steps: Register at nearest Anganwadi Centre
Provide details of child / pregnancy / breastfeeding status
Receive supplementary nutrition, health check-ups, and immunisation

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free loans: Shishu (up to ₹50K), Kishore (₹50K–₹5L), Tarun (₹5L–₹10L), Tarun Plus (₹10L–₹20L)

eligibility.allied_agri: Poultry, dairy, fishery, beekeeping, agri-processing eligible
eligibility.credit_history: Should not be a bank defaulter

application_steps: Visit any bank, MFI, NBFC, or RRB
Apply through mudra.org.in or jansamarth.in
Submit business plan and KYC documents
Bank appraises and sanctions loan
MUDRA card issued for working capital withdrawals

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
schemes.benefit: Free skill training with certification; stipend during training; placement assistance; ₹500–₹1,500 reward on certification

eligibility.education: No minimum requirement; priority to school/college dropouts and unemployed

application_steps: Visit pmkvyofficial.org and find nearest training centre
Register online with Aadhaar
Select preferred job role / trade
Complete free training at PMKVY training partner
Appear for assessment by Sector Skill Council
Receive NSQF-aligned certificate and placement support

schemes.name: Startup India
schemes.benefit: Tax exemptions, fast-track patent filing, fund of funds access, regulatory relaxations

eligibility.age_of_entity: Less than 10 years from date of incorporation
eligibility.annual_turnover: Less than ₹100 crore in any previous financial year
eligibility.innovation: Working towards innovation, development, or improvement of products/services
eligibility.not_formed_by: Splitting or restructuring of an existing business

application_steps: Register on startupindia.gov.in
Fill Startup India registration form
Describe innovation / technology solution
DPIIT recognises startup within 2–3 working days
Apply for tax exemptions, IPR benefits separately

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
schemes.benefit: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000–₹5,000 after age 60 based on contribution

exclusions: Income tax payers (as of 1 Oct 2022 onwards excluded)

application_steps: Visit bank branch or net banking of your savings account
Fill APY registration form
Choose pension amount (₹1K–₹5K/month) and contribution frequency
Aadhaar-based e-KYC or branch KYC
Auto-debit set up from savings account

schemes.name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
schemes.benefit: 5 kg free food grain (rice/wheat) per person per month under NFSA
application_steps: Beneficiaries identified through NFSA ration card
Visit nearest Fair Price Shop (FPS / Ration Shop)
Aadhaar-based ePoS authentication
Collect free food grains every month

schemes.name: National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP)
schemes.benefit: Monthly pension: ₹300–₹500 for elderly, widows, and disabled persons

eligibility.common_criteria: Must belong to a BPL household

IGNOAPS.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme

IGNWPS.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme

IGNDPS.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme

application_steps: Visit Gram Panchayat / BDO / District Social Welfare office
Fill NSAP application form
Submit BPL certificate, Aadhaar, age/disability/widow proof
District approval and pension credited monthly to bank account

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY)
schemes.benefit: All-weather roads connecting unconnected rural habitations

eligibility.note: This is a government infrastructure scheme; villages/GPs submit proposals through district/state

application_steps: Gram Panchayat / District Collectorate files proposal
DPR prepared and submitted to Ministry
Road sanctioned and constructed by State PWD / PIU
Citizens benefit from connectivity automatically

schemes.name: SVAMITVA Scheme
schemes.benefit: Property rights card (Rights of Record) for rural household owners; enables bank loans against property

eligibility.target: Residents of villages whose land is mapped under drone survey
eligibility.benefit_for: All rural household property owners in surveyed villages

application_steps: Drone survey of village conducted by Survey of India
Maps verified by Gram Panchayat
Property card (legal document) generated for each household
Distributed via State Revenue Department / Gram Panchayat

schemes.name: National Rural Livelihood Mission (NRLM / DAY-NRLM)
schemes.benefit: Support for Self Help Groups (SHGs); revolving fund; capital subsidy; bank linkage; skill training

eligibility.shg_membership: Must be willing to form or join a Self Help Group

application_steps: Contact nearest NRLM / Aajeevika resource person or Gram Panchayat
Women form a Self Help Group (10–20 members)
SHG registered with bank and receives revolving fund
Access to credit, skill training, and market linkages

schemes.name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.benefit: Promotes education and welfare of girl child; links to Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana

eligibility.target: Girl children; families with girl children
eligibility.residence: All India (focus on selected low sex-ratio districts)

application_steps: Open Sukanya Samriddhi account for girl child at post office or bank
Register with nearest Anganwadi for nutrition and health support
Ensure girl child's school enrolment

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
schemes.benefit: ₹5,000 maternity benefit (1st child) / ₹6,000 for 2nd child if girl (in 3 instalments)

eligibility.applicant: Pregnant and lactating women aged 19 years and above
eligibility.condition: For first live birth (and 2nd birth if girl child)
exclusions: Central/State Government employees who receive paid maternity leave
documents_required: MCP Card (Mother and Child Protection Card)

application_steps: Register at nearest Anganwadi Centre / Health facility within early pregnancy
Fill PMMVY application form
Submit Aadhaar, MCP card, and bank details
Three instalments credited to bank account upon milestones

schemes.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
schemes.benefit: High-interest savings scheme for girl child; interest rate ~8.2% p.a.; tax-free maturity

eligibility.opened_by: Parents or legal guardians of girl child
eligibility.residency: Girl child must be resident Indian citizen

application_steps: Visit any Post Office or authorised bank branch
Fill SSY account opening form
Submit girl child's birth certificate and parent KYC
Deposit minimum ₹250 to open account
Account operative for 21 years from opening or until marriage after 18

schemes.name: Stand-Up India
schemes.benefit: Bank loan from ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprise

eligibility.project_type: Greenfield (first-time enterprise in manufacturing, services, agri-allied, or trading)
eligibility.controlling_stake: In non-individual enterprise: ≥51% shareholding by SC/ST or woman
eligibility.default_status: Should not be in default to any bank

application_steps: Register at standupmitra.in portal
Create profile and fill loan application
Select preferred bank branch
Submit business plan and KYC documents
Bank sanctions loan; moratorium up to 18 months

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
schemes.benefit: Credit-linked subsidy 15–35% of project cost; max project: ₹50L (mfg) / ₹20L (services)

education.general: No minimum for projects up to ₹10L (mfg) / ₹5L (services)
education.higher_projects: 8th standard pass for projects above those limits

eligibility.project_type: New enterprises only (existing units not eligible)
documents_required: Caste / special category certificate if applicable

application_steps: Apply online at kviconline.gov.in/pmegp
Fill application with personal and project details
Submit at KVIC / KVIB / DIC office
Interview and project appraisal
Bank sanctions loan; subsidy deposited in term loan account

schemes.name: PM SVANidhi (PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
schemes.benefit: Collateral-free working capital loan: ₹10K (1st) → ₹20K (2nd) → ₹50K (3rd); 7% interest subsidy

eligibility.applicable_to: Street vendors vending in urban areas on or before 24 March 2020
eligibility.id_required: Certificate of Vending or Identity Card from ULB
alternate_eligibility: Identified in ULB survey but not yet received vending cert (provisional cert issued)
Vendors from peri-urban/rural areas vending within ULB limits with Letter of Recommendation (LoR)

application_steps: Apply online at pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in or via lending institutions
Submit Aadhaar and vending certificate
Loan sanctioned by bank / MFI / SFB
Repay on time to access higher loan in next cycle
Register on digital payment platforms for cashback incentive
